goal: harden AgentOps repo operating loop determinism

ranked_items.title: Fix Codex plugin hook packaging and dangerous-git parsing
ranked_items.why_now: Concrete installed-runtime bug with direct push-workflow impact and limited file ownership.

ranked_items.title: Scope release audit artifact validation to relevant artifacts
ranked_items.why_now: Concrete false-blocking gate from local-only historical artifacts; narrow validator/test slice.

ranked_items.title: Define repo-local .agents mutability policy and write-surface contract
ranked_items.why_now: Policy vocabulary needed before broad validation mutation changes.

ranked_items.title: Codify repo execution profile no-mutation validation lanes
ranked_items.why_now: Machine-readable lane metadata prevents future prompt-only policy drift.

ranked_items.title: Make validation hermetic and non-mutating by default
ranked_items.why_now: Central objective, but safest after policy and lane metadata are clear.

ranked_items.title: Classify canonical root cleanliness and worktree disposition blockers
ranked_items.why_now: Needs .agents policy vocabulary to classify root dirt without hiding policy edits.

ranked_items.title: Bound bd and Dolt closeout command behavior
ranked_items.why_now: Important automation reliability fix; can proceed independently once ownership is assigned.

applied_items.reason: All .agents-writing hooks and helpers should use canonical state path resolution.
Local validation needs behavior fixtures that catch real drift.
Release artifact scoping must coordinate with the larger zero-trust release evidence epic.
